name: auditlanes
description: Run an agent-assisted multi-lane codebase audit workflow with structured reports and reducer state.

interface.longDescription: Coordinates calibrated audit lanes, structured JSON sidecars, reducer state, and final audit reports. Security is the stable bundled profile; production-integrity, performance, and workflow-evidence are experimental runnable; architecture is metadata-only.
defaultPrompt: Run a complete AuditLanes security audit for this repo through the --complete gate.
Show the available AuditLanes audit profiles for this repo.
